title: React Native Mobile App (Expo)
description: Complete route from Expo project init to a production-ready React Native app with state management, auth, error monitoring, and analytics.

steps.description: Initialize a new Expo project with TypeScript and file-based routing (Expo Router)
Add schema validation for forms and API responses
Add user authentication with Clerk (supports Expo natively)
Add crash reporting and error monitoring
Add product analytics and feature flags
